title: Human with S2 Organ
wikitext:
[]: Human with S2 Organ?             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Oct 18, 2008 9:58 pm Is it possible..If an Eva which is Human can have one then could a normal Lilim Human be capable of having a smaller version of one? The picture above is simply a demonstration Alright, lets say that I myself am walking and some higher race saw it fit that I be given this, this does not make me God for I do not have both the seeds. This does give me the ability to live on forever with infinite energy and life. I would not notice it at first but then I would start to see that I was no longer hungry or tired. I did not need and food intake or rest to keep my body going. My body would also start to become faster and stronger then it was before with this extra energy to power it. What this also could mean is that my brain itself could become much more powerful or better yet I could use the other 90% of it. This could enable me to do things such as Psyche powers and stuff of that nature. I could even be capable of producing what could be identified as an AT-Field or just a force field to keep others out. I could go on like this..What are your thoughts on this and is this the right place to post this, it does have to do with Eva in the sense of the S2 engine.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Oct 18, 2008 11:04 pm I'd say it's entirely possible. Kaworu was arguably exactly that, but missing our mysterious fruit of knowledge. Most likely it would make such a person effectively a 'god', actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Oct 19, 2008 12:33 am Iron Man anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Sun Oct 19, 2008 2:17 am Generator Gawl, anyone? I'd be happy to munch away at Zeruel's marshmallow face for my own S2 Engine.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Oct 19, 2008 9:39 am 'Cept it's made of bone, and only Yui-sama has the strength to munch that .

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sun Oct 19, 2008 10:59 am What was it Fuyutsuki said in EoE. Something about Eva01's pilot possessing both the fruit of knowledge and the fruit of life, and therefore becoming God. (Right about the time it turned into a giant space-tree of life). An odd though occurs to me on a tangent to this: /Gendou had Adam's embryo implanted in his right hand, including Adam's S^2? Would that not have made him God then? In a similar vein, where under the Tree of Life on the ceiling of his office was Gendou's desk. If it was under 'Keter' I'm going to smirk fiendishly.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Oct 19, 2008 11:33 am I think Adam's S2 was in Kaworu. In any case, if wouldn't have been in the embryonic Adam or else it'd have grown and become an Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Sun Oct 19, 2008 3:16 pm Yeah, since he was in his embryonic form, I don't think that Adam possesed an S2 organ. Also, it's rather feasible that it was within Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 19, 2008 4:50 pm ...though Gendo likely salvaged Kawarou's after Shinji played 'pop goes the weasel' with him. Why did he need Rei then? ha! You're assuming anything about 3I makes any logical sense, a fatal error.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sun Oct 19, 2008 7:48 pm I was under the impression that you never do get a direct view of a S2 organs, as the red orb, the Core is supposed to be a distinct component. As for the effects/benefits of a S2 core in a individual we can only guess: It is supposed to be a energy center so perhaps it functions as a new way of providing for cellular equilibrium reactions (ATP if it’s still used?) and can through some sort of scalar field grant this effect through the body. If such the being would no longer need external sources of energy and oxygen, and would not need a circulatory and respiratory system (Their by explaining the Angel’s environments) it would also mean that Angels could only be seriously injured on a cellular level (hence their resilience). I suppose the fact that some of Kaworu’s concept sketches showed him with “Angelic” anatomy is relevant, of course visible angel anatomy didn’t make it into vis final design.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Oct 19, 2008 9:29 pm He was gonna be a kitty! >///< Why is he not a kitty! Ill update this once I think more into this...

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Oct 20, 2008 1:08 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: He was gonna be a kitty! >///< Why is he not a kitty! Ill update this once I think more into this...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Oct 20, 2008 1:30 am I would totally watch an angel cat try to break it's own neck.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 20, 2008 2:38 am Synapsid wrote: I suppose the fact that some of Kaworu’s concept sketches showed him with “Angelic” anatomy is relevant

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Oct 20, 2008 2:40 am ^ So the core is the private part of the angel eh? You learn something new about Eva every day.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 20, 2008 2:54 am Well, judge for yourself -- http://www.evacommentary.org/omake/xhe - or indeed any of the core shots in the series itself.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:06 am ^Bwahaha, Kaworu has a vagina. So it was the lack of testosterone that made him go gay. It all makes sense now.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Mon Oct 20, 2008 10:00 am Mr. Tines wrote: So that's why the shower scene was composed as it was -- there have been comments about that enough in the past, that Shinji was blushing because he could see her core.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Mon Oct 20, 2008 10:04 am I don't know why Kaworu would need an S2. If he is just like Rei then he's a human clone with an Angel's soul. Now sure he can do all sorts of crazy stuff normal humans can't, but so could Rei and nobody asks where her S2 came from. For all we were shown Kaworu doesn't have a core either, his death was a human's death not an Angel's. I've always thought of Kaworu as just a human vessel of Adam's soul, exactly like Rei. Therefore he would have the fruit of knowledge instead of life. That would explain how he could choose to die rather than mindlessly marching on towards an instinctual reunion with real body. All his powers were AT based, and as he said that was merely the "light of my soul," and again, given Rei's performance that would not need an S2 engine. I never imagined Lilith having an S2 engine. We should assume that she has the ability to generate an AT Field given that Rei is able too. She is never shown with a core either although she could have one internally. Unit 01 needs a core to hold a human soul, we don't need one to hold our own and Lilith shouldn't either. Could Lilith ever move independently? As a Seed of Life all she needs to do is crash on a planet and bleed a while. Unit 01 acquired her S2 like she did her new left arm, from an angel. The other Eva's the development of an S2 engine could have been intentionally deactivated during their cloning process. Any argument you make runs into serious problems. There are too many inconsistencies and overlaps concerning Angels and Lilim. And I'm pretty sure Kaworu has a penis. Shinji can be pretty dense, but I think he would have noticed something wrong if he didn't. Especially when Kaworu stood up in the bath and practically waved it in Shinji's face.

[]: Kaworu the hermaphrodite?             Quote Post by Synapsid » Mon Oct 20, 2008 10:41 am ^ Don’t worry Kaworu probably has a khram (although who knows). Reichu’s esteemed theory is that Adam/Kaworu is essentially feminine in nature (and you could consider the Gainax TabrisXX product a tacit acknowledgment of this) although Kaworu’s human body needn’t be female. However as the Kabalic text EVA used considers Adam Kadmon (the progenitor to angel and man) to be an androgine there is a very real chance that Kaworu is a hermaphrodite!
